one_liner: Cardiac rehab after stent placement — clean file, criteria met, draft approve
clinical_summary: 68F with drug-eluting stent placed 2026-06-12 for NSTEMI. Cardiologist prescribes supervised cardiac rehabilitation, 3 sessions weekly for 12 weeks, with risk-factor modification and outcomes assessment.

draft_decision.rationale: Qualifying event (PCI with stent) within twelve months; physician-prescribed program.
